query:
-- 1. Verificar labelAssociations para o produto RIOHEX (SKU 107540)
SELECT la.id, la.labelCode, la.productId, la.tenantId, la.batch, la.unitsPerBox, la.totalUnits, la.status
FROM labelAssociations la
JOIN products p ON la.productId = p.id
WHERE p.sku = '107540'
ORDER BY la.id DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- 2. Verificar todos os produtos com SKU 107540 em todos os tenants
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId, status
FROM products
WHERE sku = '107540'
ORDER BY tenantId;

-- 3. Verificar se o productId 210001 existe na tabela products
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId, status
FROM products
WHERE id = 210001;

-- 4. Verificar se há products com SKU 107540 no tenant 1 (global)
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId
FROM products
WHERE sku = '107540' AND tenantId = 1;
